IsA: It is a water colour painting.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by depicting the three children of Sir Henry Blake and his wife Lady Blake.
UsedFor: It is used for being featured in the second episode of the BBC TV series Fake or Fortune?.
LocatedIn: It is located in the Bahamas.
CreatedBy: It was created by Winslow Homer.
DiscoveredBy: It was discovered by Tony Varney.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Winslow Homer.
ConsistsOf: It consists of watercolour and pencil.
KnownFor: It is known for being featured in the BBC TV series Fake or Fortune?.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Winslow Homer.
It is associated with the Blake family.
It is associated with Lady Blake.
It is associated with Sir Henry Blake.
It is associated with Olive Blake.
It is associated with Maurice Blake.
It is associated with Arthur Blake.
It is associated with John Arbuthnot.
It is associated with Tony Varney.
It is associated with Selina Varney.
About: It is about the three children of Sir Henry Blake and Lady Blake.
